findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "verify_transfer_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_transfer_code" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get the EPP/transfer authorization code for a completed domain purchase. Requires a transfer_token from verify_transfer_code. Args: order_id: The order ID of a …

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "buy_domain" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Start the purchase flow for an available domain via Stripe checkout. IMPORTANT: Before calling this tool, you MUST first call check_domain to get the price, the…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "buy_domain" is 1507 chars, far longer than this server's median (293). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
